race.comment: SUMICH (8) broke the maiden status in impressive fashion at Mackay last time out and will have taken some confidence from that victory. Winning rider Cormack stays on top and can go back-to-back without surprising. THE LAST SAGA (3) is a four-time winner over this track and trip, draws the inside alley and gets 3kg off with the claim. Plenty to like about his prospects. MILK MAID (12) was a touch disappointing at the latest effort but go on the solid win at Mackay two back. May bounce right back with the low weight. HEROIC BEACH (6) will find this easier than recent south QLD outings and can improve sharply from the low draw. One for the exotics. NOTFORTHEMONEY (7) is a last-start winner who shouldn't be slept on.
